Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We'll let you in on a secret—our ramen is really good for your skin. The collagen that our dishes contain is sure to make you stunning![n]=========================[n]Our tender pork is a friend of beautiful skin. Make yourself shine by eating at Hagakure.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today is our special menu day.[n]{f 1 5 0}We only have limited quantities, so get yours before they run out! First come, first served![n]=========================[n]Our tender pork is a friend of beautiful skin. Make yourself shine by eating at Hagakure.[n]{f 1 1}
